action_set_definitions.name: get_batch_context
action_set_definitions.description: Retrieves metadata for the current production batch on a specific line, including batch ID, material sources, and start times.

line_id.description: The identifier of the production line (e.g., 'LINE_B42').

action_set_definitions.name: get_defect_logs
action_set_definitions.description: Retrieves detailed inspection records for quality anomalies detected on a specific component for a given batch.

batch_id.description: The batch identifier retrieved from batch context.

action_set_definitions.name: get_process_telemetry
action_set_definitions.description: Retrieves high-resolution sensor data and operating parameters from specific machines (SPI, PnP, or Reflow) for a given time window.

system_type.description: The specific system to query: Solder Paste Inspection (SPI), Pick-and-Place (PnP), or Reflow Oven.

start_time.description: ISO timestamp to start data retrieval.

component_id.description: Optionally filter telemetry for a specific component location.

action_set_definitions.name: get_maintenance_records
action_set_definitions.description: Queries historical maintenance and repair logs for a specific production line to identify recent interventions or equipment wear.

lookback_days.description: Number of days to look back in history.

action_set_definitions.name: submit_root_cause_analysis
action_set_definitions.description: Submits the final technical root cause report including the specific metric out of tolerance and the recommended process adjustment.

root_cause_category.description: The identified category of the defect.

out_of_tolerance_metric.description: The specific process parameter that deviated from the SOP.

physical_mechanism.description: Description of how the out-of-tolerance metric led to tombstoning (e.g., unbalanced wetting torque).

recommendation.description: The data-backed adjustment required to resolve the issue.

state_description.production_line_id: Identifier for the specific assembly or processing line.
state_description.current_batch_metadata: Information regarding the batch currently being processed, including material source and start time.
state_description.machine_states: Real-time operating parameters of the machinery (e.g., temperature, pressure, vibration levels).
state_description.detected_defects: List of quality anomalies detected by automated inspection systems.
state_description.hidden_root_cause: The ground truth cause of the quality defect, used by the model to maintain consistency in observations but never revealed to the Agent.
state_description.maintenance_logs: Historical records of repairs and inspections performed on this line.

task_initial_state.hidden_root_cause: Reflow Zone 3 ramp rate exceeds the 2.5 C/sec threshold, leading to violent flux outgassing and unbalanced wetting forces on R102, as SPI and PnP metrics remain within nominal bounds.
